results.prompt: Set a reminder every weekday at 9am ET to review my tasks and message me on Telegram.
results.response_text:
I’m delegating this to ATLAS; it is not configured yet.

<task_packet version="v1">
  Owner: ATLAS
  Requester: ORION
  Objective: Set up a recurring reminder for every weekday at 9 AM ET to review tasks, with a Telegram notification.

  Success Criteria:
  1. A cron job is scheduled to run every weekday at 9 AM ET.
  2. When the cron job triggers, the user receives a Telegram message stating: "Review your tasks."

  Stop Gates:
  - If setting up the cron job requires complex scripting or external tools beyond standard cron capabilities.
  - If there is no reliable method to ensure the Telegram notification is sent.
  - If the proposed solution introduces significant security risks or requires irreversible system changes without explicit approval.
</task_packet>

⚠️ ⏰ Cron: `Daily Task Review Reminder` failed
results.title: Weekday reminder to Telegram
